issues.description: First action rests Self unconditionally, but card text says 'You may rest this Character' — this should be optional/conditional, not automatic. The card allows you to rest this character as part of the activation cost/choice, not forces it.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and action 'PlaySelf' is unexplained and does not match card text. No effect in the card text describes playing this character from anywhere.
Action should be optional ('You may') but DSL lists it as mandatory. Needs conditional logic or 'optional' flag to reflect 'up to 1'.
